seoTitle: Toobanna vs Toogoolawah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Toobanna and Toogoolawah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Toobanna and Toogoolawah.
heading: Toobanna vs Toogoolawah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Toobanna, Queensland and Toogoolawah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Toobanna has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Toogoolawah (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Toobanna or Toogoolawah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Toobanna has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Toogoolawah scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Toobanna scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Toogoolawah scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Toobanna or Toogoolawah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Toobanna has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
